hero.title: Run your entire school
hero.subtitle: Akademee gives every school its own branded campus, public website and powerful dashboards for admins, teachers, accountants, students and parents.

features.title: One platform. Every department.
features.subtitle: Everything an institution needs, beautifully unified.

academics.title: Academics
academics.description: Classes, streams, subjects, timetables and grading for Anglophone & Francophone systems.

attendance.title: Attendance & Grades
attendance.description: Terms, sequences and semesters with auto-generated report cards and transcripts.

finance.title: Finance
finance.description: Fees, invoices, receipts, payroll and expense tracking with real-time analytics.

website.title: Public Website
website.description: Every school gets a branded subdomain website with 3 premium templates.

parent.title: Parent Portal
parent.description: Keep parents informed with real-time grades, attendance and fee notifications.

staff.title: Staff & Payroll
staff.description: Manage teacher contracts, attendance and payroll from a single dashboard.

analytics.title: Advanced Analytics
analytics.description: Real-time dashboards for enrollment trends, performance and revenue.

security.title: Security
security.description: Each school runs in a fully isolated tenant with role-based access control.

why.title: Why schools choose Akademee
why.subtitle: Akademee gives every school its own branded campus, public website and powerful dashboards for admins, teachers, accountants, students and parents.
features: Dark & light mode for every user

pricing.title: Simple, annual pricing
pricing.subtitle: Pick a plan, get a branded campus instantly.

grace.quote: Akademee replaced six tools. Our report cards now generate in seconds and parents love the portal.
grace.name: Grace Mbah

nadia.quote: Fee collection and payroll used to take days. Now it is one clean dashboard with real-time analytics.
nadia.name: Nadia Fomba

aicha.quote: I can follow my daughter's grades, attendance and fees from my phone. It is wonderfully simple.
aicha.name: Aïcha Njoya

items.a: Each school gets its own subdomain like graceacademy.akademee.com hosting a public website and dashboards in a fully isolated tenant.

items.q: Can I import my existing student data?
items.a: Yes, Premium and Professional plans include bulk import from Excel and CSV files, making migration seamless.
Absolutely. The platform supports English and French, with grading systems for both Anglophone and Francophone education systems.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: We accept mobile money (MTN, Orange), bank transfers, and cards. Annual plans are billed in FCFA.
Yes, every plan includes a parent portal where parents can view grades, attendance, fees, and communicate with teachers.

cta.title: Ready to modernise your school?
cta.subtitle: Launch your branded campus in minutes.

footer.description: Modern multi-tenant school management for Cameroon. Built for admins, teachers, accountants, students & parents.
